task: Apollo.io enrichment API integration for WOW#1 audience profiling (#588)
result: Implemented Apollo.io Company Enrichment API integration for audience profiling pipeline. Created apollo-enrichment.service.ts, wired it into research-audience.action.ts to call in parallel with Netrows, updated company-brief-synthesis.service.ts to include Apollo data in LLM prompts, and added APOLLO_API_KEY to .env.example. PR opened: https://github.com/slideheroes/2025slideheroes/pull/2194
